title: astragalus erraticus
intro: Astragalus erraticus, also known as the erratic milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its adaptogenic properties, which help the body adapt to stress and promote balance in the immune system. The medicinal properties of Astragalus erraticus are believed to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, which may help to protect against infections, reduce inflammation, and promote overall health. In herbal preparations, Astragalus erraticus is often used in teas, tinctures, and capsules to support the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and promote relaxation and well-being.
